title: Justice Dept. reverses course and seeks to defend orders targeting law firms
author: Mark Berman
fullText: The Trump administration had moved to drop its defense of President Donald Trump’s executive orders sanctioning law firms. A day later, it abruptly backpedaled.
summary: The Trump administration had moved to drop its defense of President Donald Trump’s executive orders sanctioning law firms. A day later, it abruptly backpedaled.
